questionHtml: Deduce whether the motion of Z is simple harmonic.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

motion is not SHM ✓

«because SHM requires force proportional to r and» this force depends on 1r2 ✓


ALTERNATIVE 2

motion is not SHM ✓

energy-distance «graph must be parabolic for SHM and this» graph is not parabolic ✓

meta.title: Deduce whether the motion of Z is simple harmonic.
